reset.dialogMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to their defaults? This includes editor preferences, auto-save interval, and custom keyboard shortcuts.

readableLineLength.description: Limit content width for comfortable reading. Set to 0 for full width.

highlightActiveLine.description: Highlight the line the cursor is on

defaultViewMode.label: Default View Mode
defaultViewMode.description: View mode when opening new files (applies on next file open)

codeBlockLineNumbers.label: Code Block Line Numbers
codeBlockLineNumbers.description: Show line numbers in fenced code blocks

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose a built-in or custom theme
theme.invalidThemeFile: Invalid theme file. Must have id, name, dark, and colors fields.
theme.parseError: Failed to parse theme file. Must be valid JSON.

accentColor.label: Accent Color
accentColor.description: Primary color for highlights, borders, and active elements

sidebarPosition.label: Sidebar Position
sidebarPosition.description: Place the sidebar on the left or right

uiFontSize.label: UI Font Size
uiFontSize.description: Font size for menus, sidebar, and panels

themeMarketplace.noThemesFound: No themes found. Add a registry below.

typewriterMode.description: Keep the cursor vertically centered while typing

welcomeView.description: Show recent files and vault stats when no file is open

wikiLinks.description: Enable [[wiki-link]] syntax highlighting, completion, and click-to-open

wordCountGoal.label: Word Count Goal
wordCountGoal.description: Set a target word count and track progress in the status bar

colorSubfolders.description: Subfolders inherit their parent folder's color

colorFolderIcon.description: Apply color to the folder icon

colorFolderName.description: Apply color to the folder text label

colorFolderBackground.label: Color Folder Background
colorFolderBackground.description: Apply a subtle tinted background to the folder row

colorChevron.description: Apply color to the expand/collapse arrow

fileStyle.description: How files inherit their folder's color

colorFileIcon.label: Color File Icon

colorFileName.description: Apply inherited color to file text labels

colorFileBackground.label: Color File Background
colorFileBackground.description: Apply a subtle tinted background to file rows

colorIntensity.label: Color Intensity
colorIntensity.description: Opacity for background tint and accent bar

wikiLinksOptions.title: Wiki Links Options
wikiLinksOptions.description: Configure how wiki-links behave when clicking and completing.

openInNewTab.label: Open in New Tab
openInNewTab.description: Open wiki-link targets in a new tab instead of the current one

showFullPath.label: Show Full Path
showFullPath.description: Show full file path on hover over wiki links

createOnFollow.label: Create on Follow
createOnFollow.description: Create a new file if the wiki-link target does not exist when clicked

livePreviewOptions.title: Live Preview Options
livePreviewOptions.description: Choose which markdown elements are rendered inline while editing.

codeBlocks.label: Code Blocks
codeBlocks.description: Render code blocks with syntax highlighting

autoComplete.label: Auto-Complete Tags
autoComplete.description: Suggest existing tags from the vault when typing #

nestedTags.label: Nested Tags
nestedTags.description: Support nested tag hierarchy using #parent/child syntax

graphOptions.title: Graph View Options
graphOptions.description: Customize graph rendering and performance settings.

nodeSize.label: Node Size
nodeSize.description: Size of nodes in the graph (1–20)

showOrphans.label: Show Orphan Notes
showOrphans.description: Display notes with no links to other notes

maxNodes.label: Max Nodes
maxNodes.description: Maximum number of nodes to render (50–2000)

backlinksOptions.title: Backlinks Options
backlinksOptions.description: Configure how backlinks are displayed in the sidebar panel.

contextLines.label: Context Lines
contextLines.description: Number of surrounding lines to show for each backlink (0–5)

groupByFolder.label: Group by Folder
groupByFolder.description: Group backlinks by their parent folder instead of a flat list

outlineOptions.title: Outline Options
outlineOptions.description: Configure the document outline panel behavior.

minHeadingLevel.label: Minimum Heading Level
minHeadingLevel.description: Only show headings at or above this level (1 = H1, 6 = H6)

variablesOptions.title: Variables Options
variablesOptions.description: Configure variable syntax and replacement behavior. Variables use frontmatter values.

highlightVariables.label: Highlight Variables
highlightVariables.description: Color-code variables in the editor based on resolution status

openDelimiter.label: Open Delimiter
openDelimiter.description: Character(s) that start a variable reference

closeDelimiter.label: Close Delimiter
closeDelimiter.description: Character(s) that end a variable reference

defaultSeparator.label: Default Separator
defaultSeparator.description: Character between variable name and default value

missingValueText.label: Missing Value Text
missingValueText.description: Text shown when a variable has no value and no default

supportNesting.label: Support Nesting
supportNesting.description: Allow dot notation for nested frontmatter values (e.g. server.ip)

caseInsensitive.label: Case Insensitive
caseInsensitive.description: Ignore case when matching variable names to frontmatter keys

arraySeparator.label: Array Separator
arraySeparator.description: Text used to join array values when replacing

preserveOnMissing.label: Preserve on Missing
preserveOnMissing.description: Keep the variable syntax unchanged if no value is found

sidebarButtonAction.label: Sidebar Button Action
sidebarButtonAction.description: What happens when clicking the Variables button in the sidebar

dailyNotesOptions.title: Daily Notes Options
dailyNotesOptions.description: Configure where daily notes are stored and how they are named.

notesFolder.label: Notes Folder
notesFolder.description: Folder path relative to vault root where daily notes are saved

dateFormat.label: Date Format
dateFormat.description: Format used for the daily note filename

templateFile.label: Template File
templateFile.description: Path to a template file relative to vault root (leave empty for no template)

codeFoldingOptions.title: Code Folding Options
codeFoldingOptions.description: Configure which elements can be folded in the editor.

foldHeadings.label: Fold Headings
foldHeadings.description: Allow folding markdown headings to collapse their content

minFoldLevel.label: Minimum Fold Level
minFoldLevel.description: Only fold headings at or above this level (1 = H1, 6 = H6)

highlightColor.label: Highlight Color
highlightColor.description: Catppuccin color used for highlighted text background

propertiesOptions.title: Properties Options
propertiesOptions.description: Configure the YAML frontmatter properties widget.

showTypes.label: Show Types
showTypes.description: Display the data type (string, number, array, etc.) next to each property

statusBarOptions.title: Status Bar Options
statusBarOptions.description: Choose which statistics are shown in the status bar.

selectionStats.label: Selection Stats
selectionStats.description: Show word and character count of selected text

saveInterval.label: Save Interval
saveInterval.description: Delay in ms after typing before auto-saving (500–30000)

spellcheckOptions.title: Spellcheck Options
spellcheckOptions.description: Cascade uses a built-in dictionary to check spelling. Right-click misspelled words for suggestions or to add them to your custom dictionary.

enableSpellcheck.label: Enable Spellcheck
enableSpellcheck.description: Underline misspelled words in the editor

skipCapitalized.label: Skip Capitalized Words
skipCapitalized.description: Don't flag capitalized words (proper nouns, acronyms)

customDictionary.title: Custom Dictionary
customDictionary.description: Words you've added will not be flagged as misspelled. You can also add words by right-clicking underlined words in the editor.

templatesOptions.title: Templates Options
templatesOptions.description: Configure template folder and available template variables.

variables.title: File name without extension
variables.dateFormat: Custom date format (e.g., MMMM D, YYYY)
variables.cursor: Cursor position after template is applied

searchOptions.title: Search Options
searchOptions.description: Configure default search behavior for vault-wide search (Ctrl+Shift+F).

caseSensitive.label: Case Sensitive
caseSensitive.description: Match exact letter casing by default

useRegex.label: Use Regex
useRegex.description: Interpret search queries as regular expressions by default

wholeWord.label: Whole Word
wholeWord.description: Only match whole words by default

focusModeOptions.title: Focus Mode Options
focusModeOptions.description: Configure distraction-free writing. Toggle focus mode with F11 or Ctrl+Shift+Enter.

dimParagraphs.label: Dim Paragraphs
dimParagraphs.description: Dim non-active paragraphs to focus on the current one

typewriterScrolling.label: Typewriter Scrolling
typewriterScrolling.description: Keep cursor centered vertically while in focus mode

wordCountGoalOptions.title: Word Count Goal Options
wordCountGoalOptions.description: Set a target word count for your writing sessions.

targetWords.label: Target Words
targetWords.description: Number of words to aim for

showInStatusBar.label: Show in Status Bar
showInStatusBar.description: Display progress toward goal in the status bar

notifyOnReach.label: Notify on Reach
notifyOnReach.description: Show a toast notification when the goal is reached

canvasOptions.title: Canvas Options
canvasOptions.description: Visual whiteboard for spatial thinking with draggable cards, connections, and groups.

enableCanvas.label: Enable Canvas
enableCanvas.description: Allow creating and viewing .canvas files as visual whiteboards

snapToGrid.label: Snap to Grid
snapToGrid.description: Snap cards and groups to the grid when dragging

defaultCardWidth.label: Default Card Width
defaultCardWidth.description: Width of new text cards in pixels (100–800)

defaultCardHeight.label: Default Card Height
defaultCardHeight.description: Height of new text cards in pixels (60–600)

showMinimap.label: Show Minimap
showMinimap.description: Display a minimap overview in the corner of the canvas

autoLayout.label: Auto-Layout
autoLayout.description: Default layout algorithm for new canvases

edgeStyle.label: Edge Style
edgeStyle.description: Default curve style for connections between cards

snapSensitivity.label: Snap Sensitivity
snapSensitivity.description: How close an object must be to a grid line to snap (1–50)

showEdgeLabels.label: Show Edge Labels
showEdgeLabels.description: Display text labels on connections between cards

exportBackground.label: Export Background
exportBackground.description: Include the grid background when exporting canvas as PNG or SVG

bookmarksOptions.title: Bookmarks Options
bookmarksOptions.description: Bookmark files for quick access via the sidebar panel. Right-click a file to toggle its bookmark.

enableBookmarks.label: Enable Bookmarks
enableBookmarks.description: Show the bookmarks panel and allow starring files

typewriterOptions.title: Typewriter Mode Options
typewriterOptions.description: Keep the active line centered vertically while typing.

verticalOffset.label: Vertical Offset
verticalOffset.description: Where to position the cursor (0% = top, 50% = center, 100% = bottom)

indentGuidesOptions.title: Indent Guides Options
indentGuidesOptions.description: Show vertical lines at each indentation level.

guideColor.label: Guide Color
guideColor.description: Color of the indent guide lines

imagePreviewOptions.title: Image Preview Options
imagePreviewOptions.description: Show inline image previews below image links in the editor.

maxHeight.label: Max Height
maxHeight.description: Maximum height in pixels for inline image previews

mediaViewerOptions.title: Media Viewer Options
mediaViewerOptions.description: View images and PDF files directly in editor tabs.

pdfDefaultZoom.label: PDF Default Zoom
pdfDefaultZoom.description: Default zoom level for PDF files (25-400%)

imageDefaultZoom.label: Image Default Zoom
imageDefaultZoom.description: Default zoom behavior when opening images

syncOptions.title: GitHub Sync
syncOptions.description: Sync your vault to a GitHub repository for backup and cross-device access.
syncOptions.patHintPrefix: Generate at GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens. Requires
syncOptions.automaticSyncDesc: Periodically sync your vault in the background

tocOptions.title: Table of Contents Options
tocOptions.description: Auto-generate a table of contents from document headings. Use the command palette to insert or update.

autoUpdateOnSave.label: Auto-Update on Save
autoUpdateOnSave.description: Automatically update the TOC when saving the file

queryOptions.title: Query Preview
queryOptions.description: Query blocks let you create dynamic views of your notes based on frontmatter properties. Write a query inside a query code block and it will render as a live table or list. Click inside the rendered result to edit the query.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Queries read the frontmatter properties (YAML metadata) at the top of your markdown files.
howItWorks.note: ...can be found by queries that filter on status, priority, or tags. Queries also detect inline #tags in the body of your notes.

examples.title: Examples
examples.booksRated: Show all books rated 4 or higher
examples.allNotes: All notes with no specific filter

tips.title: Tips
tips.clickFile: Click on any file name in the results to open that note.
tips.clickQuery: Click inside the rendered query to reveal and edit the raw query code.
tips.tableNoFields: If TABLE is used without field names, all properties from matching notes will be shown.
tips.caseSensitive: Property names are case-sensitive. Make sure WHERE field names match your frontmatter exactly.
tips.tagsCase: Tags in FROM #tag are matched case-insensitively, both in frontmatter tags: and inline #tag usage.
tips.listProperties: List-type properties (like tags: [a, b]) are displayed as comma-separated values and can be searched with contains.
tips.largeVaults: Queries scan your entire vault (or the filtered subset) each time. For very large vaults, use FROM to narrow the scope.
